message:
fix(store,command): add JSON control character escaping and legacy listpack sizing

JSON Handling (fr-store):
- Add proper JSON control character escapes for bytes 0x08 (\b),
  0x0C (\f), and 0x01-0x1F (\u00XX) in string serialization
- Implement \u escape sequence parsing in JSON decoder for unicode
  escape handling

List Encoding (fr-store):
- Add list_fits_legacy_listpack_size() helper respecting legacy
  list_max_listpack_size config with byte thresholds at -1 to -5
- Lists exceeding legacy limits properly fallback to quicklist encoding
- Add test verifying listpack→quicklist fallback behavior

Lua (fr-command):
- Add missing json_to_lua_value import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
